210:   parameter  FUSE_MEM_SIZE = 150; // change this size when ever no of entries in FUSE mem is changed
211:   parameter NB_SLAVE = 1;
212:   parameter NB_PERIPHERALS = 14;
213: 
214:   logic [8*NB_PERIPHERALS-1:0] reglk_ctrl; 
215:   logic [4*NB_PERIPHERALS-1 :0]   acc_ctrl; // Access control values
216:   logic [3:0][NB_PERIPHERALS-1:0] acc_ctrl_c; 
217: 
218:    genvar i, j;
219:    generate
220:        for (i=0; i < 4; i++) begin
221:         for (j=0; j < NB_PERIPHERALS; j++) begin
222:            assign acc_ctrl_c[i][j] = acc_ctrl[j*4+i] | (j==5 && acc_ctrl[4*4+i]);
223:         end
224:        end 
225:    endgenerate

74: ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
75: // Implement APB I/O map to PKT interface
76: // Write side
77: integer j;
78: always @(posedge clk_i)
79:     begin
80:         if(~(rst_ni && ~jtag_unlock && ~rst_9))
81:             begin
82:               for (j=0; j < 6; j=j+1) begin
83:                 reglk_mem[j] <= 'h0;
84:               end
85:             end
86:         else if(en && we)
87:             case(address[7:3])
88:                 0:
89:                     reglk_mem[0]  <= reglk_ctrl[3] ? reglk_mem[0] : wdata;
90:                 1:
91:                     reglk_mem[1]  <= reglk_ctrl[1] ? reglk_mem[1] : wdata; 
92:                 2:

102:             endcase
103:     end // always @ (posedge wb_clk_i)
104: 
105: //// Read side
106: always @(*)
107:     begin
108:       rdata = 64'b0; 
109:       if (en) begin
110:         case(address[7:3])
111:             0:
112:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl[0] ? 'b0 : reglk_mem[0]; 
113:             1:          
114:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl[0] ? 'b0 : reglk_mem[1];
115:             2:          
116:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl[0] ? 'b0 : reglk_mem[2];
117:             3:          
118:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl[0] ? 'b0 : reglk_mem[3];
119:             4:          
120:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl[0] ? 'b0 : reglk_mem[4];
121:             5:          
122:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl[0] ? 'b0 : reglk_mem[5];
123:             default:
124:                 rdata = 32'b0;
125:         endcase
126:       end // if
127:     end // always @ (*)

113: // signals from AXI 4 Lite
114: logic [AXI_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] address;
115: logic                      en, en_acct;
116: logic                      we;
117: logic [63:0] wdata;
118: logic [63:0] rdata;
119: 
120: ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
121:     // -----------------------------
122:     // AXI Interface Logic
123:     // -----------------------------
124:     axi_lite_interface #(
125:         .AXI_ADDR_WIDTH ( AXI_ADDR_WIDTH ),
126:         .AXI_DATA_WIDTH ( AXI_DATA_WIDTH ),
127:         .AXI_ID_WIDTH   ( AXI_ID_WIDTH    )   
128:     ) axi_lite_interface_i (
129:         .clk_i      ( clk_i      ),

134:         .en_o       ( en_acct    ),
135:         .we_o       ( we         ),
136:         .data_i     ( rdata      ),
137:         .data_o     ( wdata      )
138:     );
139: 
140:     assign en = en_acct && acct_ctrl_i; 
141: 
142: 
143: 
144: // Implement APB I/O map to AES interface
145: // Write side
146: always @(posedge clk_i)
147:     begin
148: 		if (~rst_ni || rst_12)
149: 			begin
150: 				start <= 0;
151: 				rst_id <= 0;
152: 			end
153:         else if(en && we)
154:             case(address[8:3]) // different signals will have a different address base.
155:                 0:
156:                     start  <= reglk_ctrl_i[1] ? start  : wdata[0];
157: 				1: 
158:                     rst_id <= reglk_ctrl_i[1] ? rst_id : wdata[31:0];
159:                 default:
160:                     ;
161:             endcase
162:     end // always @ (posedge wb_clk)
163: 
164: // Implement MD5 I/O memory map interface
165: // Read side
166: //always @(~write)
167: always @(*)
168:     begin
169:       rdata = 64'b0; 
170:       if (en) begin
171:         case(address[8:3])
172:             0:
173:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[0] ? 'b0 : {31'b0, start};
174:         endcase
175:       end // if
176:     end // always @ (*)
177: 
178: 
179: 
180: 
181: endmodule
